title: xanthophyllum octandrum
intro: Xanthophyllum octandrum, also known as the five-stamen xanthophyllum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Polygalaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum octandrum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
